svg.title: Tilt Maze Game — Build Handoff Plan
svg.desc: A phased build plan across 5 phases: core engine, levels, persistence, polish, and packaging

g.text: HTML canvas + DeviceMotion tilt → physics ball rolling
JSON-defined maze grid with silly obstacles per level
Save highest level reached across sessions
Polish, screen flow, animations, mobile UX
Single self-contained .html file, zero dependencies, offline-capable
Inline all JS, CSS, level data — open in any mobile browser
